_meta.name: DAO Paper Chart Stylizer v2
_meta.description: Optimized workflow for academic chart enhancement - preserves data accuracy
_meta.author: DAO Simulator
_meta.analysis_notes: Based on ultrathink analysis: higher steps, lower denoise, euler_a sampler

optimization_rationale.steps: Increased from 20→40 for finer detail without over-processing
optimization_rationale.denoise: Reduced from 0.3→0.15-0.2 to preserve chart data accuracy
optimization_rationale.cfg: Reduced from 7→5.5 to prevent over-stylization of clean charts
optimization_rationale.sampler: Changed to euler_a for smoother gradients in scientific visualizations
optimization_rationale.prompts: More specific to scientific/academic chart aesthetics

_meta.title: Load Matplotlib Chart
_meta.note: Load the base chart generated by paper-update.ts

inputs.text: professional scientific chart, academic publication quality, Nature journal style, clean vector lines, precise axis labels, legible text, high contrast data points, minimal chart junk, Edward Tufte style, white background, crisp edges, anti-aliased lines, professional color palette

_meta.title: Positive Prompt - Academic Style
_meta.note: References Tufte for data visualization best practices

inputs.text: blurry text, distorted labels, warped lines, curved axes, bent grid lines, smudged numbers, unreadable text, jpeg artifacts, compression noise, low resolution, pixelated, watermark, decorative elements, 3D effects, gradient backgrounds, drop shadows, chart junk

_meta.title: Negative Prompt - Preserve Data Integrity
_meta.note: Explicitly prevents distortions that would corrupt data representation

parameters_explained.cfg: 5.5 - Lower than default to prevent over-stylization
parameters_explained.denoise: 0.18 - Very low to preserve original chart structure
parameters_explained.sampler: euler_a - Smoother results for clean lines

_meta.title: Sharpen Text/Lines
_meta.note: Light sharpening to crisp up text and data lines

minimal_enhancement.description: Barely touch the chart - just upscale and slight cleanup

standard.description: Default enhancement - balance between cleanup and preservation

aggressive_cleanup.description: For charts with visible artifacts - use carefully

usage_instructions: 1. Generate base chart with: npm run paper:charts
3. Load this workflow (drag JSON into ComfyUI)
4. In node 1, load your chart from paper/figures/
5. Select preset or adjust denoise based on chart quality
6. Queue prompt and wait for generation
8. Compare output with original - verify data accuracy
data_preservation_checks: All axis labels readable and correctly spelled
Data points in same positions as original
Error bars same length and position
No warping or distortion of grid lines
